mapper.select: SELECT id, title, excerpt, tag, record_date FROM topics ORDER BY record_date ASC
SELECT id, title, excerpt, tag, record_date FROM topics WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topics WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, excerpt, tag, record_date FROM topics WHERE LOWER(title) = LOWER(#{title}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topics (id, title, excerpt, tag, record_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{excerpt}, #{tag}, #{date})
